services.name: Amazon Bedrock
services.description: Fully managed service for building generative AI applications with foundation models from Amazon, Anthropic, Meta, and others.
services.examRelevance: Core service for the exam. Know InvokeModel, InvokeModelWithResponseStream, model IDs, request/response formats for each model family.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases
services.description: Managed RAG solution. Handles chunking, embedding, indexing, and retrieval from S3 data sources.
services.examRelevance: Key for RAG questions. Know RetrieveAndGenerate vs Retrieve APIs, vector store options (managed, OpenSearch Serverless, Aurora pgvector), chunking strategies.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Guardrails
services.description: Content filtering, PII detection, topic restrictions, and word filters for responsible AI.
services.examRelevance: Critical for safety questions. Know how to apply guardrails to input vs output, policy types, ApplyGuardrail API.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Agents
services.description: Autonomous agents that can reason, plan, and take actions using tools (action groups).
services.examRelevance: Key for agentic AI questions. Know action groups, Lambda integration, session management, trace analysis.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management
services.description: Version-controlled prompt templates with variables and governance.
services.examRelevance: Know prompt template structure, variables, versioning, and integration with Bedrock APIs.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Flows
services.description: Visual workflow builder for chaining prompts, conditions, and integrations.
services.examRelevance: No-code/low-code GenAI workflows. Know node types, conditional branching, input/output mapping.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Model Evaluations
services.description: Automated evaluation of FM outputs for quality, relevance, and safety.
services.examRelevance: Testing and validation questions. Know evaluation job types, metrics, human evaluation setup.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock Data Automation
services.description: Document processing and data extraction using foundation models.
services.examRelevance: Know use cases for document understanding, form extraction, data normalization.

services.name: Amazon SageMaker
services.description: End-to-end ML platform for building, training, and deploying models.
services.examRelevance: Know endpoints for custom models, Model Registry for versioning, Processing jobs for data prep, Data Wrangler for transformation.

services.name: Amazon Q Business
services.description: Enterprise AI assistant that connects to company data sources.
services.examRelevance: Know data source connectors, access control, deployment options for enterprise chat.

services.name: Amazon Q Developer
services.description: AI-powered developer assistant for code generation, refactoring, and debugging.
services.examRelevance: Know IDE integration, code transformation capabilities, security scanning features.

services.name: Amazon Comprehend
services.description: NLP service for sentiment analysis, entity extraction, PII detection.
services.examRelevance: Pre-processing and safety. Know PII detection API, entity types, integration patterns with GenAI.

services.name: Amazon Transcribe
services.examRelevance: Multimodal pipelines. Know real-time vs batch transcription, custom vocabulary.

services.name: Amazon Rekognition
services.examRelevance: Multimodal processing. Know content moderation, label detection, face analysis.

services.name: Amazon Titan
services.description: Amazon's foundation models for text and embeddings.
services.examRelevance: Know Titan Text vs Titan Embeddings, use cases, pricing model.

services.name: AWS Lambda
services.examRelevance: Primary compute for GenAI. Know integration with Bedrock, timeout limits, memory settings for model invocations.

services.name: Amazon EC2
services.examRelevance: Know when EC2 is preferred over Lambda (long-running, GPU, large memory).

services.name: AWS Step Functions
services.examRelevance: Critical for agentic patterns. Know ReAct implementation, human-in-the-loop, error handling, circuit breakers.

services.name: Amazon EventBridge
services.description: Serverless event bus for event-driven architectures.
services.examRelevance: Know event patterns, rule-based routing, integration with GenAI workflows.

services.name: Amazon SQS
services.description: Managed message queue for decoupling services.
services.examRelevance: Async processing patterns. Know FIFO vs Standard, dead-letter queues, visibility timeout.

services.name: Amazon SNS
services.examRelevance: Know fan-out patterns, filtering, integration with Lambda.

services.name: AWS AppConfig
services.description: Dynamic configuration management with feature flags.
services.examRelevance: Dynamic model selection without code changes. Know deployment strategies, validation.

services.name: Amazon API Gateway
services.description: Managed API service for REST, HTTP, and WebSocket APIs.
services.examRelevance: Frontend for GenAI. Know WebSocket for streaming, request validation, throttling, authorization.

services.name: Amazon CloudFront
services.description: CDN for content delivery and edge caching.
services.examRelevance: Edge caching for GenAI responses. Know cache behaviors, Lambda@Edge integration.

services.name: Amazon VPC
services.description: Virtual private cloud for network isolation.
services.examRelevance: Security. Know VPC endpoints for Bedrock, private connectivity, security groups.

services.name: Amazon S3
services.description: Object storage for any data type.
services.examRelevance: Knowledge base sources, prompt templates, model artifacts. Know object metadata, lifecycle policies, versioning.

services.name: Amazon DynamoDB
services.description: NoSQL database for fast, scalable key-value storage.
services.examRelevance: Conversation history, session state, metadata. Know TTL, streams, global tables.

services.name: Amazon ElastiCache
services.examRelevance: Semantic caching for GenAI. Know Redis vector search, cache-aside patterns.

services.name: Amazon MemoryDB
services.examRelevance: Durable caching and vector storage. Know differences from ElastiCache.

services.name: Amazon Aurora
services.examRelevance: pgvector extension for vector search. Know when Aurora vs OpenSearch for embeddings.

services.name: Amazon RDS
services.examRelevance: Metadata storage, structured data. Know when RDS vs Aurora vs DynamoDB.

services.name: Amazon Neptune
services.description: Graph database for highly connected data.
services.examRelevance: Knowledge graphs, relationship modeling. Know graph queries with GenAI.

services.name: Amazon DocumentDB
services.examRelevance: Document storage, JSON data. Know vector search capabilities.

services.name: Amazon OpenSearch Service
services.description: Search and analytics engine with vector search capabilities.
services.examRelevance: Critical for RAG. Know Neural plugin, k-NN, hybrid search, sharding strategies.

services.name: Amazon Athena
services.description: Serverless SQL queries on S3 data.
services.examRelevance: Ad-hoc analysis of GenAI logs, cost analysis.

services.name: AWS Glue
services.examRelevance: Data pipelines for FM training data. Know Data Quality, Data Catalog, crawlers.

services.name: Amazon Kinesis
services.examRelevance: Streaming data for real-time GenAI. Know Data Streams vs Firehose.

services.name: Amazon QuickSight
services.examRelevance: GenAI dashboards, Q integration for natural language queries.

services.name: Amazon ECS
services.examRelevance: Container deployments for custom models, MCP servers. Know task definitions, Fargate vs EC2.

services.name: Amazon EKS
services.examRelevance: Kubernetes for ML workloads. Know node groups, GPU instances.

services.name: AWS Fargate
services.examRelevance: Serverless containers for GenAI. Know when Fargate vs EC2 launch type.

services.name: Amazon ECR
services.examRelevance: Storing custom model containers, inference images.

services.name: AWS IAM
services.examRelevance: Critical for security. Know Bedrock IAM actions, least privilege, resource-based policies.

services.name: AWS KMS
services.examRelevance: Data encryption for GenAI. Know CMKs, envelope encryption, key policies.

services.name: AWS Secrets Manager
services.examRelevance: API keys, credentials for external integrations.

services.name: AWS WAF
services.examRelevance: API protection, rate limiting, SQL injection prevention.

services.name: Amazon Cognito
services.examRelevance: User authentication for GenAI apps. Know user pools, identity pools, JWT tokens.

services.name: AWS Lake Formation
services.examRelevance: Fine-grained access control for training data.

services.name: Amazon Macie
services.description: PII and sensitive data discovery in S3.
services.examRelevance: Data security for GenAI. Know scanning, alerts, integration patterns.

services.name: Amazon CloudWatch
services.examRelevance: Critical for observability. Know custom metrics, Logs Insights, alarms, dashboards.

services.name: AWS X-Ray
services.examRelevance: GenAI request tracing. Know service maps, trace analysis, segments.

services.name: AWS CloudTrail
services.examRelevance: Compliance and governance. Know Bedrock API logging, insights.

services.name: AWS CodePipeline
services.examRelevance: GenAI deployment pipelines. Know stages, actions, approvals.

services.name: AWS CodeBuild
services.examRelevance: Building GenAI artifacts, running tests.

services.name: AWS CloudFormation
services.examRelevance: Deploying GenAI infrastructure. Know Bedrock resources, stack management.

services.name: AWS CDK
services.examRelevance: Programming infrastructure. Know L2 constructs, CDK for Bedrock.

services.name: AWS SAM
services.examRelevance: Serverless GenAI deployments. Know template structure, local testing.

services.name: AWS Amplify
services.description: Full-stack web and mobile development platform.
services.examRelevance: Frontend for GenAI apps. Know hosting, authentication, UI components.

services.name: AWS Outposts
services.examRelevance: Hybrid GenAI deployments. Know supported services, latency considerations.

services.name: AWS Wavelength
services.examRelevance: Ultra-low latency GenAI. Know deployment model, carrier integration.
